dashboard.label: Splunk Platform Daily Health
dashboard.description: Morning operational health check — Search Heads | Indexers | Heavy Forwarders | DBConnect | iFWs

search.query: index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers | fields title | rename title AS host] | stats count AS issues | eval status = case(issues < 5, "GREEN", issues < 20, "AMBER", true(), "RED") | fields status, issues

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers splunk_server=* | fields host | dedup host] | stats count AS issues | eval status = case(issues < 5, "GREEN", issues < 20, "AMBER", true(), "RED") | fields status, issues

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd group=tcpin_connections | stats max(_time) AS last_seen BY hostname | eval offline = if((now() - last_seen) > 3600, 1, 0) | stats sum(offline) AS issues | eval status = case(issues = 0, "GREEN", issues < 5, "AMBER", true(), "RED") | fields status, issues

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) (component=DBX* OR component=JDBCDriver OR message="*dbconnect*" OR message="*jdbc*") | stats count AS issues | eval status = case(issues = 0, "GREEN", issues < 10, "AMBER", true(), "RED") | fields status, issues

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd group=tcpin_connections | stats max(_time) AS last_seen BY hostname | eval offline = if((now() - last_seen) > 1800, 1, 0) | stats sum(offline) AS issues | eval status = case(issues = 0, "GREEN", issues < 3, "AMBER", true(), "RED") | fields status, issues
index=_audit action=search info=skipped | timechart span=1h count AS skipped_searches

panel.title: Search Head — Concurrent Searches vs Limit

search.query: index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=SearchConcurrencyMgr | timechart span=5m max(current_running_searches) AS running avg(search_concurrency_limit) AS limit
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) | timechart span=1h count BY log_level
index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler | timechart span=1h avg(lag) AS avg_lag_secs max(lag) AS max_lag_secs

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=SearchInspector | eval runtime_mins = round(run_time / 60, 1) | where runtime_mins > 5 | stats count BY search_id, user, app, runtime_mins | sort -runtime_mins | head 20 | rename search_id AS "Search ID", user AS User, app AS App, runtime_mins AS "Runtime (min)"
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) | stats count BY message | sort -count | head 10 | rename message AS "Error Message", count AS Count
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=Metrics group=queue | eval fill_pct = round((current_size / max_size) * 100, 1) | timechart span=5m max(fill_pct) BY name
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=Metrics group=thruput | timechart span=5m avg(instantaneous_kbps) AS avg_kbps sum(total_k_processed) AS total_kb
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) | anomalydetection action=annotate | timechart span=1h count BY log_level
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=Metrics group=queue name=parsingqueue | eval fill_pct = round((current_size / max_size) * 100, 1) | timechart span=5m avg(fill_pct) AS parsing_queue_pct

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, CRITICAL) [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers splunk_server=* | fields host | dedup host] | stats count BY host, message | sort -count | head 15 | rename host AS Host, message AS "Error Message", count AS Count

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd group=tcpin_connections | stats max(_time) AS last_seen BY hostname | eval hours_silent = round((now() - last_seen) / 3600, 1) | where hours_silent > 1 | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort -hours_silent | rename hostname AS Host, hours_silent AS "Hours Silent", last_seen AS "Last Seen"

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=Metrics group=queue name=tcpout_genericqueue | eval fill_pct = round((current_size / max_size) * 100, 1) | timechart span=5m avg(fill_pct) AS tcpout_queue_pct BY host
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd (component=TcpOutputProc OR component=TcpOutputFd) log_level IN (ERROR, WARN) | timechart span=1h count BY host
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd component=IndexerAckTracker log_level IN (WARN, ERROR) | timechart span=1h count AS ack_failures BY host

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, WARN) NOT [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers | fields title | rename title AS host] | stats count BY host, message | sort -count | head 15 | rename host AS Host, message AS "Error Message", count AS Count

index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (ERROR, WARN) | stats count BY host, message | anomalydetection action=annotate | where isAnomaly = 1 | sort -count | head 10 | rename host AS Host, message AS "Anomalous Message", count AS Count
